name: connectme
description: ConnectMe - Social Media & Couples Communication App

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile" --names "API,WEB,MOBILE" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta"
scripts.predev:backend: node -e "(async()=>{try{const kill=require('kill-port');await kill(5000);console.log('Freed port 5000');}catch(e){console.log('Port 5000 already free');}})()"
scripts.predev:web: node -e "(async()=>{try{const kill=require('kill-port');await kill(3000);console.log('Freed port 3000');}catch(e){console.log('Port 3000 already free');}})()"
scripts.predev:mobile: node -e "(async()=>{try{const kill=require('kill-port');await kill(8081);console.log('Freed port 8081');}catch(e){console.log('Port 8081 already free');}})()"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile" --names "API,WEB,MOBILE" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:web && npm run build:mobile
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && echo Backend build completed - no build step needed for Node.js
scripts.test: concurrently "npm run test:backend" "npm run test:web" "npm run test:mobile" --names "API,WEB,MOBILE"
scripts.clean: npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:web && npm run clean:mobile
scripts.clean:backend: cd backend && if exist node_modules rmdir /s /q node_modules && if exist package-lock.json del package-lock.json
scripts.clean:web: cd web && if exist node_modules rmdir /s /q node_modules && if exist package-lock.json del package-lock.json && if exist .next rmdir /s /q .next
scripts.clean:mobile: cd mobile && if exist node_modules rmdir /s /q node_modules && if exist package-lock.json del package-lock.json && if exist ios\Pods rmdir /s /q ios\Pods && if exist ios\Podfile.lock del ios\Podfile.lock
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:web && npm run lint:mobile

author: ConnectMe Team
